Fortunately, precise point positioning (PPP)-B2b corrections broadcast by geostationary orbit satellites represent a valuable reference for achieving high-accuracy RT precise orbit determination (POD).

A 10-day experiment revealed that incorporating PPP-B2b corrections notably enhanced the along direction accuracy, and resulted in an average orbital determination accuracy of 0.11, 0.18, and 0.08 m in the radial, along, and cross directions, respectively.
